title: Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ord Mantell}} {{Battle |prev=[[Raid on Wayland (25 ABY)|Raid on Wayland]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' |conc= |next=*[[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Bilbringi]] *[[Battle of the Orinda system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |image=[[File:NJO_Sourcebook_Ord.jpg]] |name=Battle of Ord Mantell |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] (Between 60:11–61:1)Using information from ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', it is possible to place the [[First Battle of Obroa-skai]] in 60:11 and the [[Battle of Fondor]] in 61:1; thus, the Battle of Ord Mantell must occur between those dates. |place=[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] |result=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]/[[Imperial Remnant]] tactical victory |side1=*New Republic *[[Imperial Remnant]] |side2=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Yald Sutel]] *[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Ark Poinard]] |commanders2=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tla]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] **''[[Erinnic]]'' *1 [[Mediator-class battle cruiser|''Mediator''-class battle cruiser]] *2 [[Quasar Fire-class cruiser-carrier/Legends|''Quasar Fire''-class bulk cruisers]] **''[[Thurse]]'' *3 [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] *5 [[Ranger-class gunship|''Ranger''-class gunships]], *[[T-65A3 X-wing starfighter]]s *[[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]] *[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]] *[[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] |forces2=*[[Uro-ik v'alh]] battleships *2 [[I'Friil Ma-Nat]] corvettes *5 [[Ro'ik chuun m'arh]] frigates *1 [[Miid ro'ik]] warship *3 [[Matalok]] light cruisers *[[Yorik-et|Coralskippers]] *[[Qworlth skaal]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Damage to some Ord Mantell cities *Battle cruiser *3 gunships *1 frigate *Starfighters *Refugees |casual2=*Both corvettes *At least 2 frigates *Coralskippers |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I'm not certain how, but we managed to chase them off.|[[Ark Poinard]]|}} The '''Battle of Ord Mantell''' was a battle fought during the first [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It marked the first use of a [[qworlth skaal]] during the war. ==Background== {{Quote|Colonel Kalenda, what is the nature of the intelligence Elan furnished?''"
"''The Yuuzhan Vong's next target - Ord Mantell.|[[Viqi Shesh]] and [[Belindi Kalenda]]|}} As the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] moved into the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid]] and [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rims]], the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in orbit around [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] became a transit point for refugees fleeing the advancing front line. The Yuuzhan Vong decided to launch an attack on Ord Mantell, ostensibly in the hope that the projected [[Death/Legends|death]] of countless refugees would do much to destabilize the already floundering [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In reality, the battle was a ruse intended to trick New Republic leaders into trusting the would-be Yuuzhan Vong defectors [[Elan]] and [[Vergere]]. Prior to the battle, as part of her mission to earn the confidence of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] and gain access to the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]], Elan had warned the New Republic of the Yuuzhan Vong plan to attack Ord Mantell. By sacrificing some of their forces in an abortive attack on the system, the Yuuzhan Vong hoped to convince their enemies that Elan's information was accurate and therefore that her defection was genuine. ==The battle== {{Quote|In addition to the cruiser, we lost one escort frigate and three gunboats. Battle assessment estimates enemy losses as significantly high. The Jubilee Wheel is rattled but holding together. Ord Mantell describes extensive damage to some inland population centers, but adds that shields protected the coastal cities from the worst of it and that fires are under control.|An ''Erinnic''{{'s}} crewmember|}} With intel provided by Elan, the New Republic hoped to set a trap for the Yuuzhan Vong. The bulk of a task force commanded by New Republic General [[Yald Sutel]] hid behind [[Quatin]], the fifth planet of the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|system]]. When the Yuuzhan Vong emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the New Republic task force moved in behind them and proceeded to engage. Both fleets were roughly evenly matched in terms of numbers and firepower. During the height of the battle, the New Republic's battlecruiser was overwhelmed and destroyed by enemy fire. In response, Sutel brought his flagship, the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|star destroyer]] ''[[Erinnic]]'' under the command of Imperial [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Ark Poinard]], into the battle. When the ''Erinnic'' attempted to engage the lone [[Miid ro'ik]] warship however, the Yuuzhan Vong vessel turned away and began to [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombard]] the surface of Ord Mantell before proceeding to launch a qworlth skaal beast, at the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']]. Despite the efforts of New Republic star fighters, the beast, which was protected by the warship's [[dovin basal]]s, caused severe damage to the station and was able to inhale a number of the stations inhabitants to be enslaved by the Yuuzhan Vong. Despite the damage wrought by the Yuuzhan Vong fleet, the New Republic and Imperial forces soon gained the upper hand. As the Yuuzhan Vong began to withdraw, Poinard determined that his ship was too badly damaged to attempt a pursuit. Sutel agreed and expressed his belief that seeing their battered ships limping home might give the Yuuzhan Vong pause. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The New Republic was tricked into thinking it was victorious at Ord Mantell?|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]|}} The New Republic's victory at Ord Mantell temporarily helped reinforce the authenticity Elan's false defection. Her seemingly genuine intel helped to finally convince the Jedi to meet with her. Her plans unraveled however when she was [[Battle of Bilbringi (Yuuzhan Vong War)|intercepted]] en route to Coruscant by [[Peace Brigade]] members. The heavy cost of Elan's ruse, including the losses suffered at Ord Mantell, led to [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] punishing the [[Priest caste|Priest]] [[Harrar]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tla]], who had organized the plot, by sending them back to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was on the Wheel in his search for [[Reck Desh]], was one of the few to escape the qworlth skaal's clutches. Piloting a stolen shuttle away from the ''Wheel'' with the help of the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] [[Droma]], Solo was able to escape the battle and continue his hunt for the Peace Brigade member. Despite the New Republic victory, Ord Mantell would eventually fall to the Yuuzhan Vong. A number of refugees from the planet would end up on [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] which was subsequently [[Battle of Gyndine|attacked]] as well. Eventually the planet was [[Liberation of Ord Mantell|liberated]] by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] forces under [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. ==Behind the scenes== ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' confuses the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']] and [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] space stations, mistakenly stating that Big Bunji was the Wheel's administrator and that the Wheel's [[Master-Com]] controlling intelligence aided Big Bunji against the Yuuzhan Vong assault. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' {{1stID|Battle of Ord Mantell}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/viva-space-vegas-the-history-of-the-marvelous-wheel-part-2|series=Viva Space Vegas! The History of the Marvelous Wheel|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Ord Mantell (25 NSY) |es=Batalla de Ord Mantell (Guerra Yuuzhan Vong) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Ord Mantell]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]] [[Category:Orbital bombardments]]
